failures.description: The agent misread or mishandled the ProductCatalogSearch output and selected the more expensive smartphone as the cheapest, despite the tool result showing item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch result. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 first, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the relevant tool output and reflects an incorrect interpretation or use of the returned evidence. This error was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the same wrong answer.
